descriptionShort: Highlights of 1988-89 AHL game: Cape Breton Oilers vs. Moncton Hawks, featuring Sockeyes alumnus Matt Hervey.
descriptionLong: Game highlights from the 1988-89 AHL season between Cape Breton Oilers and Moncton Hawks. The footage features former Richmond Sockeyes player Matt Hervey, documenting his professional career progression following the team's 1987 Centennial Cup championship.
